title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, taught by David J. Malan. Chapter 1 covers "Playing" and demonstrates foundational AI concepts. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: This is the first chapter of CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence, Harvard's foundational AI course taught by Brian Yu, distributed as live unedited lecture content on YouTube. The chapter covers playing and game development alongside core search topics, including AI search and vector search. The course is also available through edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
